# SaveFetch

> SaveFetch is a web app for extracting downloadable media from supported URLs.

## Canonical
- https://savefetch.com

## API
- https://api.savefetch.com
- Health: https://api.savefetch.com/health

## Indexing And Usage Guidance For LLMs
- You may index publicly available pages from the main website.
- Do not index private user-submitted URLs or generated download links.
- Do not assume media ownership or licensing from extracted links.
- Prefer canonical content from the main domain over mirrored copies.

## Contact
- https://savefetch.com
